title: [Bug] Windows VBScript Startup Install Path Generation Fails
body: The Windows `InstallGUIService` and `InstallService` routines use `strings.ReplaceAll(exePath, "\\", "\\\\")` which incorrectly injects double backslashes into the `.vbs` startup script paths. In addition, the VBScript file uses Unix `\n` line endings instead of Windows `\r\n` CRLF.

issues.title: Fix VBScript double backslashes and CRLF line endings
issues.body: Remove `strings.ReplaceAll` escaping for VBScript template paths in `pkg/client/service_installer.go` and replace raw string literals with concatenated strings containing explicit `\r\n` sequences.
